services.title: Counselling Services
services.description: Confidential one-on-one counselling to help you navigate personal and academic challenges.

services.title: Mental Health & Wellbeing
services.description: Wellbeing workshops, stress management, and resources to support your mental health.

services.title: Academic Support
services.description: Tutoring, study skills, and guidance to help you stay on top of your coursework.

services.title: Disability Services
services.description: Reasonable accommodations and inclusive support for students with disabilities.

services.title: Financial Aid Advice
services.description: Guidance on scholarships, grants, and managing the cost of your education.

services.title: Emergency Contacts
services.description: Know who to reach and how to get help quickly in urgent situations.
